sections.paragraph:
verb לחסור

to grow less; lack

verb לחסר

to subtract; give less; deprive; miss

verb חוסר

be subtracted; to lack in

verb להתחסר

become less and less; have less

verb להחסיר

to subtract; give less; be absent

verb הוחסר

be subtracted

adjective

absent, missing; lacking, incomplete, minus, wanting, deficient, devoid, short, shy

masculine noun

lack, deficiency, failure, scantiness, scantness

verb לחסר (>>חיסר)

to subtract; give less; deprive; miss
